## Outcome

Describe the decision or user workflow improved.

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests cover scoring/applicability/protocol changes.
- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] UI changes include keyboard, responsive, reduced-motion, and table-equivalent checks.
- [ ] Security and data-handling impact is documented.
- [ ] Public contracts are versioned and changelog/docs updated.

## Validation

List exact commands and relevant output. Do not attach secrets or private suite data.
